# What Changed

Describe the change in concrete terms. If this PR is documentation-only, say it explicitly.

## Delivery Type

- [ ] Runtime / behavior change
- [ ] API contract exposure or endpoint change
- [ ] Configuration or infrastructure change
- [ ] Documentation-only change

## Documentation Impact

Explain what changed in docs, or why no documentation update is needed.

- `ImpiTrack/Docs/CURRENT_STATE.md`
  - [ ] Updated
  - [ ] Not needed
- Runbooks in `ImpiTrack/Docs/runbooks/`
  - [ ] Updated
  - [ ] Not needed
- ADRs in `ImpiTrack/Docs/adr/`
  - [ ] Updated
  - [ ] Not needed
- Historical docs in `ImpiTrack/Docs/history/` or superseded notes
  - [ ] Updated
  - [ ] Not needed

## Review Checks

- [ ] I checked whether this PR changes API, config, runtime behavior, operational setup, or deployment assumptions.
- [ ] If it does, I updated `ImpiTrack/Docs/CURRENT_STATE.md` or I explained why that was not needed.
- [ ] If procedures changed, I updated the relevant runbook(s).
- [ ] If an architectural decision changed, I updated or added the relevant ADR.
- [ ] If this supersedes historical material, I updated the historical reference or replacement note.
- [ ] If this PR is documentation-only, the code/runtime behavior is unchanged.

## Validation Notes

List the checks that matter for this PR.

## Risks

Call out runtime, migration, operational, or documentation drift risks.
